overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City at dusk. The car travels along elevated highways and under massive overpasses, passing the iconic Arasaka tower and through industrial districts with distinctive spherical structures. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with neon signage and atmospheric lighting.

agents.ego_description: driving at moderate speed on elevated highway following traffic flow

entered.detail: massive black corporate tower with vertical white signage reading ARASAKA
large illuminated advertising billboard on the left side of the highway
large illuminated advertising billboard on the right side of the highway
catenary wires and cables spanning across the highway
metal safety barrier along the edge of the elevated road

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway at dusk with the massive Arasaka tower dominating the skyline ahead. Brightly lit billboards line both sides of the road while other vehicles travel in the same direction. The scene is open to the sky with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with overhead signage

events.description: passing under highway gantry signs and taking exit ramp downward
vehicle begins descending the curved exit ramp

agents.ego_description: taking the exit ramp and descending from the elevated highway

entered.detail: large overhead highway sign structure with directional arrows and destination names
concrete barrier along the curved exit ramp

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under a large highway sign gantry and takes the exit ramp, descending from the elevated highway. The Arasaka tower shifts to the right as the car navigates the curving ramp, with concrete barriers and street lights becoming prominent.

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath massive concrete overpass structure
transitioning into enclosed underpass area with industrial surroundings

agents.ego_description: driving under multiple levels of highway overpasses in an industrial area

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating shadow overhead with support columns
stacked highway ramps and support structures creating multiple levels

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath massive concrete overpasses in a multi-level highway interchange. The lighting shifts to artificial as the sky is blocked by overhead structures. Industrial buildings are visible in the distance through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection under overpass with pedestrian crossing

events.description: stopping at intersection to allow pedestrians to cross the street
turning right at the intersection and accelerating

agents.ego_description: stopped at intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross, then turning right

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the vehicle
person walking along the sidewalk near the street corner

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
concrete divider with red and white striped pattern

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at an intersection under the overpass where pedestrians are crossing the street. After the pedestrians clear, the car turns right and accelerates. The area features traffic lights, concrete barriers, and a sparse crowd of people crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road under elevated highway structure

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at intersection under overpass

agents.ego_description: driving through industrial area under overpasses and stopping at traffic light

entered.detail: traffic signal suspended from overpass structure showing red
large spherical industrial storage tanks with metallic surfaces

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the industrial district beneath massive overpass structures. Large spherical industrial tanks become visible in the distance on the left. The vehicle stops at a red traffic light suspended from the overpass.

events.description: traffic light turns green and vehicle proceeds through intersection
passing under highway sign gantry indicating El Camino Real and Santo Domingo

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection and continuing along the industrial road

notable_agents.action: yellow van passing through the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: green highway sign reading El Camino Real with directional arrows
highway sign indicating direction to Santo Domingo

segments.scene_description: The vehicle proceeds through the green light at the intersection, passing under highway signs for El Camino Real and Santo Domingo. Large spherical industrial structures dominate the left side of the road as the car continues through the industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from an open, elevated highway dominated by a corporate skyline into the claustrophobic depths of a concrete industrial district. It begins by cruising toward the massive Arasaka tower under a dusk sky lined with glowing billboards, before the camera descends via a curving exit ramp as the tower shifts to the periphery. The scene then shifts from natural light to artificial shadows as the vehicle enters a multi-level interchange, passing beneath heavy concrete overpasses and pausing at a pedestrian crossing. As the car accelerates and turns, the environment opens into an industrial zone where the sky remains blocked by overhead structures and large spherical tanks emerge in the distance. Finally, the vehicle proceeds through a series of traffic lights and under highway signs for El Camino Real and Santo Domingo, moving deeper into the industrial heart of the city.
